issue_title: refactor: fixed the permission bug on team members
issue_body_preview:
When a user clicks on ¨settings¨, they should be able to see a tab that shows ¨Profile¨ ¨Team members¨ ¨roles and permissions¨

when they click on ¨team members¨ they receive a message that says ¨unauthorised¨

users that has no permission on viewing team member should not have access to view te
test_description_zh: 登录后进入设置页面，点击 'Team members' 标签页，观察页面是否正常加载团队成员列表。
expected_result_zh: 拥有相应权限的用户点击 'Team members' 标签后，应正常显示团队成员列表，而不是显示 'unauthorised' 错误消息。没有权限的用户则不应看到该标签入口。
